person.name: Sir John de St Lo

burialPlace.address: Bath Abbey Cemetery, Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Sir John de St. Lo was born at Newton St. Lo, Somerset, England.

He married Margaret Clyvedon, daughter of Sir John de Clyvedon and Elizabeth; Her 1st marriage, his 2nd marriage.

Sir John de St. Lo also married Alice Paveley, daughter of John Paveley. 

Sir John de St. Lo died on 8 November 1375; Buried in the Cathedral church of Bath.

«b»Family 1«/b»
Alice Paveley d. 21 Oct 1361

«b»Children«/b»
1.) Joan St. Lo d. bt 1422-1423

2.) Ela de St. Lo b. 1357, d. 13 Jan 1410

«b»Family 2«/b»
Margaret Clyvedon d. 5 Jan 1412

«b»Child«/b»
1.) Elizabeth de St. Lo b. c 1369, d. 14 Sep 1389

«b»Notes«/b»
Sir John's mother was apparently alive in 1326. It is unknown when she died. Sir John's birthdate is an estimate.

zh.Of, Newton St Loe, Somersetshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特牛頓 聖 勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de St Lo於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特牛頓 聖 勒時，他的父親John de St Lo31歲，母親Ela29歲。他於大約1354年與Alice Paveley在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1375年11月8日享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Lo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wai, Chao, Kam, Chun, Ming, Wei, Wing, Kin, Kwok, Wan, Ying, Chi.  Korean Chung, Pheng, Chong, Pao, Chang, Cho, Pak, Shoua, Thai, Toua, Yer, Blia.  Vietnamese Hieu, Hung, Phuc, Thong, Tien, Vinh, Bao, Bien, Chanh, Chau, Coong, Dinh Van.
Chinese: Cantonese form and alternative Mandarin form of the surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 駱, see   Luo   2.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de St Lo was born about 1330, in Newton St Loe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de St Lo, was 31 and his mother, Ela, was 29. He married Alice Paveley about 1354, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died about 8 November 1375, at the age of 46, and was buried in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de St Lo est né environ 1330, à Newton St Loe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de St Lo, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ela, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice Paveley environ 1354, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 8 novembre 1375, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Of, Newton St Loe, Somersetshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 뉴턴 스트 로이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de St Lo(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 뉴턴 스트 로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de St Lo(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1354년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Alice Paveley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1375년 11월 8일 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de St Lo nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Newton St Loe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de St Lo, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Ela, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Paveley aproximadamente 1354, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 8 de novembro de 1375, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Of, Newton St Loe, Somersetshire, Englan: нютон ст ло, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de St Lo родился около 1330 г. в местности нютон ст ло, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de St Lo было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ela, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Paveley около 1354 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер около 8 ноября 1375 г. в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
